summary: Tested payment gateway toggles feature for subscription page. Backend APIs working correctly - all 7 tests passed. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation of conditional rendering for Manual and PRC payment options.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /settings/public endpoint correctly returns all 3 flags: manual_subscription_enabled, razorpay_enabled, prc_subscription_enabled (lines 11437-11439)
Backend /admin/toggle-prc-subscription endpoint correctly toggles PRC subscription with admin PIN validation (lines 11477-11505)
Backend /admin/toggle-manual-subscription endpoint correctly toggles Manual subscription with admin PIN validation (lines 11446-11474)
Frontend AdminSettings.js has all 3 toggle cards with data-testid attributes: toggle-razorpay-btn, toggle-manual-payment-btn, toggle-prc-payment-btn
Frontend SubscriptionPlans.js correctly wraps Manual UPI/Bank button with {manualEnabled && (...)} (line 1140)
Frontend SubscriptionPlans.js correctly wraps PRC Payment button with {prcEnabled && (...)} (line 1174)
Frontend correctly fetches gateway status from /settings/public and sets state variables (lines 133-138)

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - conditional rendering implemented correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment gateway toggles feature is fully implemented. Backend APIs tested and working. Frontend code review confirms correct conditional rendering. When Manual is disabled, the Manual UPI/Bank button will NOT appear on subscription page. When PRC is disabled, the Pay with PRC button will NOT appear.
